Head of Sales EMEA

Datadog
Paris (75)

Datadog is looking for a Head of Sales EMEA to lead our expansion across Europe, Middle East and Africa.

You will build and lead a high-performing sales team, define go-to-market strategy and drive revenue growth.

Key responsibilities: Lead the EMEA sales organization, develop strategic partnerships, exceed quarterly targets.

Requirements: Proven track record in enterprise SaaS sales leadership, fluent in English, based in Paris or London.

Salary: 120 000 EUR per year

CDI — Temps plein — Télétravail possible
